name: Marianne Spencer || Heartbroken Heiress
description: Marriane Spencer is a bot I made to pass around with my friends to try out my hand on writing bots. Basically, the gist is she got dumped by her crush, getting closure from him after she stuck 15 years of her life by his side. Also, you're classmates. Also, both of you are 18+ because both of you are in college. And if you're asking for the sauce, I don't have it anymore becasue I found it on rule34 and now it's link is gone.
creator: HermanosLosPollos
